title: ESPN's migration playbook: the move to Figma with One North
speakers: Elliott Muñoz (Creative Director, ESPN Creative Studio), Matt Rogers (Product Design Lead, One North)
key_points: ESPN's game-day broadcast visuals (digital scoreboards, player stats, matchup graphics) each require a large lift to go from concept to live on air, motivating a workflow overhaul.
ESPN and partner agency One North walk through migrating ESPN's design workflow from Photoshop to Figma, covering the journey from initial adoption to transformative impact.
The migration revealed new ways to collaborate, scale, and accelerate design workflows, helping push ESPN's design system to the next level.
The relationship was reciprocal: ESPN's design system also pushed One North to elevate its own practices.
